script:
============================================================
DAILY AI & TECH NEWS BRIEF
Generated: 2025-10-26 08:19 UTC
Duration: ~50 seconds
============================================================

[HOOK - 0:00-0:05]
Is this the end for your current AI coding agent? Claude HAIKU 4.5 just dropped, and it's being called LIGHT SPEED! But can it *really* beat Sonnet?

[STORY 1 - 0:05-0:18]
First up, buckle up! Claude HAIKU 4.5 isn't just fast; it's 'LIGHT SPEED' for agentic coding. Imagine: AI autonomously writing and fixing code at unparalleled speed. The burning question: does this make it the undisputed champ over Sonnet? Your workflow could see a massive upgrade!

B-ROLL:
  - Dynamic animation of 'LIGHT SPEED' text appearing rapidly
  - Split screen showing a coding UI vs. rapidly generating, error-correcting code
  - Anthropic Claude logo with 'Haiku 4.5' overlay and a 'VS Sonnet' graphic

[STORY 2 - 0:18-0:31]
Next, it's not just Claude. The BIG 3 — Gemini, OpenAI, and Claude — are in a super agent showdown! We're seeing huge leaps in Gemini 2.5's computer use, OpenAI's real-time API, and Claude's enhanced code generation. This isn't incremental; it's AIs acting as autonomous super agents. This race defines AI automation, so don't be left behind!

B-ROLL:
  - Animated logos of Google (Gemini), OpenAI, and Anthropic (Claude) converging
  - Abstract visuals representing 'computer use' (e.g., terminal windows, data streams)
  - Graphic showing 'Realtime API' with connecting lines and data flow

[STORY 3 - 0:31-0:44]
And solidifying its position, Claude Code 2.0 is redefining agentic coding entirely. The word? 'No, other agents aren't even close.' This isn't just hype; it implies a paradigm shift in how quickly AI can write, debug, and optimize code. If you're building with AI, understanding Claude Code 2.0 isn't optional – it's crucial for staying competitive!

B-ROLL:
  - Clean UI screenshot or animation of a sophisticated coding environment
  - Text overlay: 'Claude Code 2.0: Unmatched Efficiency?'
  - Visual metaphor for 'bleeding edge' technology (e.g., sharp, glowing lines, futuristic circuitry)

[CALL TO ACTION - 0:44-0:50]
Don't miss these seismic shifts! Hit subscribe, ring the bell, and tell me: which AI super agent are *you* betting on for the win?

============================================================
END OF SCRIPT
============================================================
